stylePrompt: Create a completely original lighting product based on the Unexpected Red Theory. Build a coherent, restrained object in a non-red neutral or contrasting palette, then introduce one deliberate pure-red component that disrupts and completes the composition. The red detail must feel surprising, photographically powerful, and structurally meaningful rather than randomly applied. Keep all other forms and colors disciplined so the visual tension remains precise.
specificElements: One red pivot on an otherwise monochrome arm
A red cable emerging from a neutral body
A red inner diffuser visible only when viewed from below
A red adjustment knob with real function
A red frame intersecting a dark geometric shade
